channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 3rd June
item.description:
18/05/26 email rcvd (attached) reporting basal growth coming from tree at location causing issues
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Cw pothole Approx 300x300x40mm 3 way stop and go (CW10 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 3rd June

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 3rd June
item.description:

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Fw kerbing X1 stone needs resetting Stats required Fw closure (FW Kerbing Defects)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Cw pothole 700x500x50mm Rd closure (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree in footpath between Bradley road and Croft Road Charlton Kings, 3rd June
item.description:
I have contacted Cheltenham B.C. and they advised me to contact Gloucestershire C.C.. It's regarding an overhanging tree on the footpath between Bradley Road and Croft Road. Our postcode GL538DU. The tree is now very high and covering the footpath also our back garden. I would appreciate if someone can visit and resolve this problem. My tel is 01242520525. Many thanks. Norman O'Connell
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Path blocked by overgrown crops or vegetation, 3rd June
item.description:
Grid reference: SO95517 19991. Path blocked by crops, vegetation or overgrowth.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Greatfield Drive, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Fw abrupt level 2000x300x20mm Stats required Give and take (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Fw kerbing X1 dropped kerb needs resetting Stats required Give and take (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Path leads onto new cycleway, 3rd June
item.description:
The footpath from the Golf Course leads out onto the newly-constructed cycleway between Gloucester and Cheltenham. To make it safer for pedestrians, please could you consider putting in pedestrian crossing-style white lines.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 3rd June
item.description:

item.title: Potholes across junction, 3rd June
item.description:
Potholes across junction of Tennyson Road and Milton Road around previous patched repairs, dangerous when cycling through the junction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 141, Tennyson Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
